INDOOR CATALOGUE
2026

ABOUT US
Little Fingers India Pvt. Ltd. is a leading manufacturer of indoor and outdoor children's play
equipment, fitness equipment, and toys.
Founded in 2006 as importers and traders, the company expanded into manufacturing in
2016, marking a significant milestone in our growth journey. With a strong commitment to
quality, safety, and innovation, we design and manufacture products that promote physical
activity, creativity, and holistic development for children.
Today, Little Fingers India Pvt. Ltd. has a Pan-India presence and also caters to international
markets through exports. Our products are widely used in schools, parks, playgrounds,
residential communities, fitness spaces, and institutional environments.
Driven by customer trust and industry experience, we continue to deliver durable, safe, and
engaging play and fitness solutions that meet national and international standards.
Our Mission
To design and manufacture safe, innovaƟve, and durable play and ﬁtness equipment that supports
physical acƟvity, creaƟvity, and overall child development.
Our Vision
To become a globally recognized brand in children’s play and ﬁtness soluƟons by conƟnuously
improving quality, safety, and customer saƟsfacƟon.
Where creativity
begins, and teamwork
makes it thrive
welcome to the heart of
Little Fingers India Pvt. Ltd.
where every
Product Is Made With
Passion, Precision,
And Playfulness.

A modern pretend play kitchen with stove, oven,
sink, washing machine, shelves, and hanging
utensils. Encourages creativity and role play while
building motor skills. Durable and child-safe design.
A fun and educational wooden workbench designed to
inspire creativity and hands-on learning. Features colorful
gears, tools, bolts, and storage space to help kids develop
motor skills, problem-solving, and imaginative play.
Made from sturdy, child-safe materials for long-lasting fun.
Perfect for little builders and future engineers!
A stylish and durable wooden play kitchen with realistic
fridge, stove, sink, microwave, washing machine, and
storage space. Features turning knobs, hanging utensils,
and modern design to inspire creative role play and learning.
Perfect for developing imagination and motor skills in children.
